name: A.M.G. Karabelas PC
description: A.M.G. Karabelas P.C., operating as "The Olive Temple," is a fourth-generation, family-run olive oil producer located in Ancient Olympia, Greece. They manage a state-of-the-art mill where olives are processed within three hours of harvest, ensuring the highest quality for their award-winning extra virgin olive oils like Laurel & Flame. The producer stands out for its commitment to traceability through the "MY ID Project," allowing consumers to scan a QR code to access detailed information about the oil's origin and production.

name: Aceite La Masada Roya (Andorra) - Dop Aceite Del Bajo Aragón
description: Located in Andorra within the renowned Bajo Aragón region of Spain, La Masada Roya is a distinguished producer of premium extra virgin olive oil certified under the DOP Aceite del Bajo Aragón. Founded by Pedro Valero, the estate specializes in early harvest, cold-extracted oils crafted from native varieties like the traditional Empeltre. Their meticulously crafted oils are celebrated for their harmonious flavor profiles featuring delicate notes of almond and apple, earning them prestigious international accolades. Combining decades of expertise with modern, sustainable practices, La Masada Roya's exquisite oils reflect a deep dedication to preserving the authentic, vibrant essence of Aragón's terroir.

name: Aceites Garcia De La Cruz S.L.
description: Design by GemPages ALL OF OUR OILS ARE ORGANIC, EXTRA VIRGIN & 100% FROM SPAIN

name: Aceites Queo Porcuna
description: In Queo we have been awarded with the CINVE 2023 GOLD award for our EVOO, of great quality, flavor and elaboration. This is an international olive oil event in which other companies in the same sector participate. They also award several different prizes for other sectors, but all of them of their own elaboration.

name: Acushla S.A.
description: Acushla, a word of Celtic origin that means "beat of my heart", arose from the search for a unique expression that could translate all the emotion and passion of its founder, in order to materialize this project that materialized in 2006 and allowed to unite several generations of the same family around olive-growing agriculture.

name: Adama Boutique olive oil
description: Adama Boutique Olive Oil is a producer based in Israel. The company focuses on producing high-quality extra virgin olive oils. They utilize traditional and sustainable farming methods in olive cultivation. The olive oils produced by Adama are characterized by their rich flavor profiles and are often used in gourmet cooking.

name: Agricola Sant Isidre I Sc De Juncosa Sccl
description: Agrícola Sant Isidre i S.C. de Juncosa SCCL We are a Catalonian agricultural cooperative founded in 1919, with 140 producers dedicated to producing excellent quality products while preserving the land.

name: Agro Foods & Commerce
description: Agro Foods & Commerce won Gold for Priordei 1789 Rojal and Silver for Priordei 1789 Arbequina at the 2026 NYIOOC World Olive Oil Competition.

name: Agroalimentos La Redonda
description: Agroalimentos La Redonda es una empresa familiar dedicada al ACEITE DE OLIVA VIRGEN EXTRA, puro jugo de aceituna.

name: Agropecuaria El Mistol SA
description: El Mistol — Mejor AOVE de Argentina 2025. Aceite de oliva virgen extra premium de San Juan, Argentina. 350 hectáreas en los Andes. Acidez menor a 0,25%. Exportamos a Brasil, Paraguay y el mundo.

name: Agrovim S.A.
description: Agrovim is one of the largest Olive Oil producing companies in Greece. Our multi-awarded brand of olive oils & olives "ILIADA" was born here.

name: AKG Zeytincilik Gıda LTD ŞTİ
description: Aka Zeytincilik Ltd. Şti. olarak Bursa İli'nin Mudanya İlçesine bağlı Tirilye beldesine ait zeytin bahçelerimizden elde ettiğimiz zeytinlerimizi; geleneksel yöntemlerle ileri teknolojiyi birleştirerek işliyoruz.

name: Al-Zait & Co.
description: A AL-ZAIT & Co., experiências e produtos que carregam em sua essência os ativos das oliveiras e sua origem histórica.

name: Almazara Artal (Albalate Del Arzobispo) - Dop Aceite Del Bajo Aragón
description: DEL OLIVO A LA BOTELLA: COMPRA ACEITE DE OLIVA VIRGEN EXTRA ONLINE En nuestra tienda encontrarás una selección de aceites de oliva virgen extra del Bajo Aragón, elaborados con dedicación y control en cada fase, desde el campo hasta la botella.

name: Almazaras De La Subbetica S.L.
description: Rincón de la Subbética is an organic extra virgin olive oil, made exclusively from Hojiblanca olives, harvested in the early days of the season. Born in the heart of the Sierras Subbéticas Natural Park, this EVOO has been awarded year after year as the best organic olive oil in the world.

name: Anshei Hazait
description: Anshei HaZayit Yaniv Zaban runs Anshei Zayit with both respect, love and marvel for everything olive. A professional and trained olive grower from central Israel, Zaban produces quality olives and oils including the revered Coratina olive and the popular and peppery Syrian olive.

name: Apadrinaunolivo.Org (Oliete) - Dop Aceite Del Bajo Aragón
description: This oil is proof that passion finds means, Apadrinaunolivo.org, the first social and solidary extra virgin oil of the world.

name: Aparthenasa
description: What we do We take care of the health and biodiversity of 6.5 ha of olive trees, and work closely with millers, agronomists, researchers and land agents in order to produce limited quantities of monovarietal, high phenolic and sensorially exciting Extra Virgin Olive Oil.

name: Assi emek amayanot
description: Assi, Emek HaMa'ayanot Assi Olive Mill stands in the fertile plains near Beit She'an, where olive cultivation has shaped daily life since biblical times. Their mission: elevate Israeli olive oil while honoring the hardworking families who grow the fruit itself.

name: Azeite Casa Mourad
description: Compra rápida Azeite de oliva premium extravirgem, com sabor leve, agradável e perfeita harmonia... adicionar ao carrinho

name: Azeite Organico Bene
description: Produzido na Fazenda São Benedito, em Bom Sucesso de Itararé (SP), o azeite orgânico brasileiro Bene conquistou o "Blend Gold Award" na edição de 2026 da Anatolian International Olive Oil Competition, premiação voltada a azeites de oliva extravirgem realizada na Turquia. O produto foi o único representante brasileiro premiado na competição.

name: Azeite Três Meninas
description: Única marca de azeite no mundo a ser eleita por 3 anos consecutivos o MELHOR AZEITE DO BRASIL e entre os 10 MELHORES AZEITES DO MUNDO no Concurso Internacional TerraOlivo do Mediterrâneo (2022, 2023 e 2024)

name: Barel Olive oil
description: Since 1936, Bari Olive Oil grows & produces the finest Extra Virgin Olive Oil in California. Bari is proud to offer Organic and Vegan Extra Virgin Olive Oil, authentic Balsamic Vinegar from Modena, Italy, a line of Olive Oil Skincare Products, and Olive Oil Product Accessories.

name: Bio Evoo S.L.
description: OlioEvo.eu is the online shop for the sale of extra virgin olive oil and where you can buy the best 100% Italian extra virgin olive oil and products based on Italian extra virgin olive oil directly from the producers. Not only the best organic extra virgin olive oil but also kitchen accessories, gastronomic favors, ceramic oil cruets, olive wood cutting boards, unique and original gift items ...

name: Bio Orto
description: A collection that preserves the purity and richness of the Apulian oil-making tradition through organic extra virgin olive oils from native cultivars such as Ogliarola , Peranzana and Coratina . Each bottle is born from a careful process, respectful of the land and time, to offer only the best of fresh fruit and cold pressing.

name: borlu Tarım İşletmeleri
description: We produce high-quality extra virgin olive oil with care and expertise. Our olives are processed under strict quality controls for. The Olive Oil Ania (Yesilce/ PreGreen) delivers in quality and taste. This Olive Oil has the premium level of freshness. Crafted from sun-drenched groves, our olive oil reflects our rich heritage.

name: Bozburun Tarım LTD ŞTİ
description: Ne şanslıyım ki, Ağabey dediğim kişi eşi ile birlikte bu işletmeyi yoktan var etti. Ve sayenizde gönül rahatlığıyla sevdiğim ailem ve dostlarımla birlikte ürettiğiniz zeytin yağları ve fazlasına ulaşabiliyorum.

name: BVS JerusalemOliveOil
description: BVS Jerusalem Olive Oil Jerusalem Olive Oil is a family-owned boutique producer from Beit Hanan, Israel. Founded in 1928, the farm is now led by third-generation farmer Moosh Ashkenazi and his wife Hani. Their award-winning extra virgin olive oils are made with passion, tradition and care from handpicked olives cold-pressed on harvest day.

name: California Olive Ranch
description: Award-winning quality from California and beyond. With over 230 awards over the last 10 years, elevate your cooking with our extra virgin olive oils, vinegars, sauces, marinades, pestos, and sprays.

name: Camp De Cogul SCCL
description: The cooperative combines heritage and modern expertise, preserving the region's authentic character. El Cogul, famous for its prehistoric cave paintings recognised as a UNESCO World Heritage Site, also hides another treasure—its exceptional extra virgin olive oil, where tradition and modernity meet in liquid form.

name: Capolivo
description: Discover Pasolivo's award-winning California olive oil. Single-origin and heart-healthy, our high quality premium olive oils are all pressed in Paso Robles, CA.

name: Carm - Casa Agricola Roboredo Madeira S.A.
description: Entre em contacto conosco. Casa Agrícola Roboredo Madeira, SARua da Calábria - 5150-021 Almendra, Portugal / Tel +351 279 718 010Fax +351 279 718 011 / info@carm.pt

name: Catsacoulis S.A.
description: . CATSACOULIS S.A. Olive Oil Exporting Co, is the oldest olive oil company in Greece, founded in 1863 on the island of Lesvos . From the start we were export-oriented, as the extra virgin olive oil of our island is strongly appreciated abroad. Early on we gave priority to conditioning the product in small packages adapted to the needs of the ...

name: Colhida
description: Colavita also offers a selection of infused oils including Roasted Garlic, Lemon, Truffle, and more! Each of these oils is infused with high quality ingredients and are perfect for marinades, dressings, dips, and roasting! A fan favorite is our Certified FODMAP Friendly Roasted Garlic Extra Virgin Olive Oil.

name: Comercializadora Y Exportadora Las Doscientas Spa
description: Conoce nuestro excelente aceite de oliva extra virgen de consumo diario que no puede faltar en tu mesa

name: Cooperativa Agrícola Dos Olivicultores De Murça Crl
description: A Cooperativa dos Olivicultores de Murça apresenta-lhe o melhor azeite transmontano. Premiado internacionalmente, o azeite de Murça faz a diferença pelo sabor suave e requintado.

name: Cooperativa De Aceites Del Matarraña, Scl (Calaceite) - Dop Aceite Del Bajo Aragón
description: Venta y producción de aceite virgen extra con D.O. Bajo Aragón y productos derivados como aceitunas y paté ecológico en la Comarca del Matarraña/Matarranya, tierra del olivar en Aragón.

name: Cooperativa La Granadella
description: About us We are farmers, we understand what olive trees need to grow and we give the land everything it requires to produce olives of the highest quality, so they can be turned into an exceptional extra virgin olive oil. The La Granadella Cooperative was created in 1920 to provide olive oil from the farmer directly to the consumer.

name: Cooperativa Olivarera Virgen De La Sierra De Cabra S.C.A.
description: En Cooperativa Olivarera Virgen de la Sierra de Cabra, cultivamos la tradición y el compromiso con la excelencia en cada gota de aceite.

name: Cooperativa Olivicultores Valpaços Crl
description: The project came into being thanks to the dedication and know-how of the olive growers of Valpaços, who have been committed to the production of top-quality olive oil since 1951: a PDO extra virgin olive oil that continues to win awards in Portugal and around the world year after year.

name: Cortijo De Suerte Alta Sl
description: The estate, El Cortijo de Suerte Alta, is located next to the town of Albendín (Baena), in the province of Cordoba (Spain). The land in this area is well known for the coexistence of the three main varieties of the olive trees in Andalucía: picudo, hojiblanco and picual.

name: Corto Olive Co.
description: Experience the freshness and full flavor of Corto Olive Oil, loved by chefs nationwide. Our EVOO is harvested at peak for exceptional taste. Explore now.

name: Cottage Products (Gozo) Ltd
description: Blessed with the sun, the fertile soil in terraced fields and the fresh groundwater agricultural products harvested in Gozo are well renowned for their superior taste and quality. Gozo Cottage was setup with the sole purpose to use and promote local Gozitan Produce.

name: Crdo Aceite De Madrid
description: Descubre el Aceite de Madrid DOP, el aceite de oliva virgen extra certificado de la Comunidad de Madrid, elaborado con aceitunas de nuestros olivares, garantía de calidad y origen. Conoce su historia, variedades y panel de cata.

name: Delice Farm House
description: We produce high-quality extra virgin olive oil with care and expertise. Our olives are blending modern techniques with ancient methods. Celebrated for its quality, aroma, and authenticity. Delice Farm House

name: Diego Hollender
description: ¿Cuál fue la decisión? Volver a los orígenes. Diego, Martín, Mariana y Federico Hollender, el equipo a pleno en el showroom de aceite de oliva en Coronel Dorrego, sobre la ruta 3.

name: Domenica Fiore
description: Recognized as the number one Italian producer, Domenica Fiore's award-winning world-class organic extra virgin olive oils are a creation brought to life by the land, the light, and the labor of masters.

name: Domenico Manca S.P.A.
description: Nella terra della Biodiversità La Sardegna è una terra unica, dove la natura è davvero capace di produrre frutti d'eccezione. È qui che produciamo il nostro Extravergine D.O.P., esclusivamente da olive del nord dell'isola, e il "Monocultivar" Bosana, oliva sarda per eccellenza.

name: Ekin Kocadağ LTD ŞTİ
description: Soğuk sıkım naturel sızma zeytinyağı Edremit'ten sofranıza. %0,1 asit oranı, yüksek kalite ve lezzet. Ekin Kocadağ ile güvenle satın alın.

name: Elasion -Malliotaki Maria
description: Gold Elasion Extra Virgin Olive Oil is a premium product, crafted exclusively from Koroneiki olives grown in carefully selected regions of Crete, renowned for producing some of the world's finest olive oil. It is made using traditional methods and without any chemical processing, preserving all its natural nutritional values. Production is limited and carefully curated, with olives harvested ...

name: Eliad Olive oil
description: Eliada Premium extra virgin olive oil is a superior olive oil obtained directly from olives and solely through mechanical processes. It has a medium fruity taste and low acidity, offering a distinctive and refined flavour. The final notes of subtle green condiments add a touch of freshness and a richness of aromas.

name: Eretz Geshur
description: On your next trip to northern Israel, plan to visit Eretz Gshur in Kibbutz Geshur, a fifteen-minute scenic ride from the Sea of Galilee, and experience the fascinating world of olive oil. During your visit, you can observe the process of olive oil production (during the harvest season); watch a film that tells the story of Eretz Gshur; learn about how olive oil is used; and, of course, taste ...

name: Eretz Zait Shemen Meshek Bar Hai David
description: RANKING MUNDIAL DE ACEITES DE OLIVA VIRGEN EXTRA

name: Essenza

Here at Es-senza, we are dedicated to producing the highest quality extra-virgin oils from the best varieties of olives. Our certified Organic and ...
